name: dayz-dev
description: Develop and review DayZ mods with verified local Enforce Script APIs and version-aware documentation.

interface.longDescription: Review, explain, and edit DayZ Enforce Script and configuration using the installed DayZ source tree first, then current authoritative documentation when local evidence is insufficient.
defaultPrompt: Review this DayZ mod for Enforce Script API mistakes
Find the correct DayZ class or method for this feature
Create a safe DayZ mod pattern for this system
